name: Reynolds & Reynolds ERA DMS API
what_it_does: Reynolds & Reynolds ERA DMS API for automotive dealer management system integration. Enables AI agents to access vehicle inventory and pricing data, manage service appointment scheduling, retrieve customer records and vehicle history, process repair orders in fixed operations, sync parts inventory, and integrate dealership data with OEM and third-party systems via the Reynolds ConnectCenter.
use_cases: Accessing vehicle inventory and stocking data from automotive retail agents
Scheduling service appointments and managing service drive from fixed operations agents
Retrieving customer and vehicle service history from CRM integration agents
Syncing parts inventory and repair order status from workshop management agents
not_for: Non-automotive retail without dealership management workflows
Franchise dealer operations without Reynolds ERA DMS specifically
Independent repair shops without franchised dealer OEM integration
best_when: An automotive dealership or dealer group running Reynolds ERA DMS wants AI agents to automate service scheduling, inventory queries, customer communications, and repair order management workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer vehicle purchase and service history is sensitive personal data. Reynolds & Reynolds has historically been restrictive about third-party data access — verify current partner terms carefully.

auth.notes: Reynolds ConnectCenter uses dealer-authorized API access. Credentials are dealer-scoped. Third-party integration requires Reynolds program approval. Historically restrictive about granting data access to third parties.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — DMS licensing plus ConnectCenter integration fees
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-dealership DMS licensing; ConnectCenter fees for third-party API access
pricing.notes: Dayton, Ohio company. Second-largest automotive DMS provider. Historically very protective of dealer data — anti-competitive data access practices led to NADA/dealer disputes. Partner program required.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per dealership and partner; documented with ConnectCenter access

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer vehicle purchase and service history is sensitive personal data
No public MCP server — proprietary ConnectCenter API with partner program required
Reynolds historically very restrictive about third-party data access — expect friction
No webhooks — must poll for data updates
Partner program approval process can be lengthy — plan accordingly
US data residency only — legacy DMS architecture
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer vehicle purchase and service data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. Proprietary partner program API. US data residency. Historically restrictive data access policies.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer vehicle and purchase data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. Proprietary partner API. US data residency only.
